1N board 472: Play the ♣9 — the cheapest of your solid ♣J-T-9: it wins as well as the ♣J, so there's no need to spend a higher card.
1M-3N_Picture_Bid board 307: Partner led low and dummy followed low, so it is up to you — play the ♣J, third hand high. Don't duck: your highest card makes declarer spend an honour to win.
1M-3N_Picture_Bid board 249: Play the ♦Q — your top card, third hand high: the queen wins, or drives out a higher honour. A small card hands declarer a free trick.
